steps.title: Use the tissue threshold
steps.content: The passage says regional endotherms have more than 30% compact myocardial tissue, unlike ectotherms. Voss and colleagues found that basking shark hearts are 47% compact myocardial tissue even though basking sharks had been classified as full ectotherms.

steps.title: Reject unsupported comparisons
steps.content: A says the evidence is insufficient, which conflicts with the passage's statement that it undermines the old classification. B and C compare the basking shark with species whose exact percentages are not given. The percentage by itself invalidates the prior categorization. The answer is D.
